  - Data flow patterns
  - Key abstractions and their relationships
  - Entry points and composition root analysis
  - Module dependency rules
  - Design principles enforced

MINIMUM 400 lines. Include actual file paths with backticks. Be thorough and detailed.

Return confirmation with file path and line count only.
